5.0.short_description: Angle about which to rotate the clump in degrees via the right-hand rule. If no angle is specified, then no rotation will occur. In 2D, rotation occurs in the out-of-plane direction

keywords.name: clump.replicate.angle
keywords.description: Angle about which to rotate the clump in degrees via the right-hand rule

keywords.name: clump.replicate.axis
keywords.description: Axis about which to rotate the clump

keywords.name: clump.replicate.density
keywords.description: Density of the clump that is 1 by default

keywords.description: Volume is set to be the equivalent to the volume of a {disk of unit thickness in 2D; sphere in 3D} with diameter <a class="reference internal" href="

keywords.name: clump.replicate.id
keywords.description: Clump ID that is the next available ID by default

keywords.description: Specify that the clump centroid will be set to the original position of the clump template when it was created

keywords.description: Clump position that is the origin by default

keywords.name: clump.replicate.name
keywords.description: Name of the clump template to be replicated

keywords.description: Scale the clump to have a volume of <a class="reference internal" href="

keywords.description: The x -component of the clump position that is 0 by default
